heading: American National Red Cross: detail of commissioned officers
label: 711a American National Red Cross: detail of commissioned officers
notes: Amendments1980— struck out “(a)” before “Commissioned”.Pub. L. 96–5131968—Subsec. (a)(1)(A). substituted “Army Medical Department” for “Army Medical Service”.Pub. L. 90–329
Effective Date of 1980 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–513section 701(b)(3) of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this titleDec. 12, 1980
amendments: Amendments1980— struck out “(a)” before “Commissioned”.Pub. L. 96–5131968—Subsec. (a)(1)(A). substituted “Army Medical Department” for “Army Medical Service”.Pub. L. 90–329
Effective Date of 1980 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–513section 701(b)(3) of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this titleDec. 12, 1980

children.label: A
children.text: one or more officers of the Army Medical Department;

children.label: B
children.text: one or more officers of the Medical Department of the Navy; and

children.label: C
children.text: one or more officers selected from among medical officers, dental officers, veterinary officers, medical service officers, nurses, and medical specialists of the Air Force; and

children.label: A
children.text: an officer of the Medical Corps of the Army;

children.label: B
children.text: an officer of the Medical Corps of the Navy; or

children.label: C
children.text: a medical officer of the Air Force.
